iOS notification delays with Focus modes

top_epic.title: Restore Huddle audio quality on macOS Sonoma clients
top_epic.rationale: 2,480 cross-channel signals — concentrated in macOS 14.x users — point to an AudioUnit reset cascade in the Huddle RTC stack when CoreAudio devices change mid-call. MOS scores dropped from 4.2 to 3.6 after the 24.03.30 desktop release, and Apple-silicon screen-share toggles are deterministically reproducible.
top_epic.verdict: Ship-critical — Huddle is the wedge against Zoom and audio is the table stake.
top_epic.recommendation: Roll back the AEC processor change behind a feature flag, ship a deterministic device-change handler, and add MOS-score telemetry to the desktop client.
acceptance_criteria: AudioUnit chain survives CoreAudio device-list changes without 30s silence
Huddle MOS score returns to >=4.1 P50 on macOS 14.x within 7 days of rollout
Screen-share + camera-toggle on M-series no longer freezes peer streams
Client emits huddle.audio.quality_degraded events with AEC reason codes
